tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: F2P tests (test_binding_ts_never_override_check_exists, test_app_ts_tracks_arrow_start_is_inside, test_binding_logic_preserves_inside_binding, test_no_orbit_override_for_fixed_binding) are ALL pure text-matching: 'assert "otherNeverOverride" in content', 'assert "arrowStartIsInside: event.altKey" in content', etc. No code is imported, called, or executed.
